case_title: MAYA KACZOROWSKI VS. 60 RAUSCH STREET HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KACZOROWSKI, MAYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 60 RAUSCH STREET HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $230.00, THE CHALLENGED ELECTION IS VOID. A NEW ELECTION MUST BE CONCLUDED BY MARCH 1, 2023. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY KACZOROWSKI, MAYA AS TO DEFENDANT 60 RAUSCH STREET HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED AUG-02-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 60 RAUSCH STREET HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DR. ALEXI EXUZIDES, PRESIDENT OF HOA. FILED BY DEPONENT 60 RAUSCH STREET HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD. PLAINTIFF MAYA KACZOROWSKI IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS PETER GERAGHTY. DEFENDANT 60 RAUSCH STREET HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DR. ALEXI EXUZIDES (PRESIDENT OF HOA) WITH WITNESS LINDA KINSEY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENVELD; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY KACZOROWSKI, MAYA 60 RAUSCH STREET HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION
